operatorRegistration.registerMustIf: [Welsh] You must register with your regulator if you either:
operatorRegistration.registerExportListInfo: [Welsh] export UK-sourced packaging waste for recycling
operatorRegistration.registerBeforeYou: [Welsh] Before you register, you need to be actively recycling or exporting the packaging waste material you are applying to be registered for.
operatorRegistration.registerOnceYouAre: [Welsh] Once you are registered, you can maintain this for future years by paying an annual charge and keeping your registration details up to date.
operatorRegistration.registerToMaintainRegistration: [Welsh] To maintain each registration you will need to pay an annual charge by 30 September to maintain your active registrations for the next calendar year and keep your registration details up to date.

recyclingOperationDetails.title: [Welsh] Recycling operation — Add overseas reprocessing site
recyclingOperationDetails.heading: [Welsh] What recycling operation is carried out at the site?
recyclingOperationDetails.label: [Welsh] Recycling operation

operations.R1: [Welsh] R1 — Use principally as a fuel or other means to generate energy
operations.R3: [Welsh] R3 — Recycling or reclamation of organic substances not used as solvents (including composting)
operations.R4: [Welsh] R4 — Recycling or reclamation of metals and metal compounds
operations.R5: [Welsh] R5 — Recycling or reclamation of other inorganic materials
operations.R6: [Welsh] R6 — Regeneration of acids or bases
operations.R7: [Welsh] R7 — Recovery of components used for pollution abatement
operations.R8: [Welsh] R8 — Recovery of components from catalysts
operations.R9: [Welsh] R9 — Oil re-refining or other reuses of oil
operations.R10: [Welsh] R10 — Land treatment resulting in benefit to agriculture or ecological improvement
operations.R11: [Welsh] R11 — Use of wastes obtained from any of the operations R1 to R10
operations.R12: [Welsh] R12 — Exchange of wastes for submission to any of the operations R1 to R11
operations.R13: [Welsh] R13 — Storage of wastes pending any of the operations R1 to R12

baselAndOecdCodes.title: [Welsh] Basel Convention and OECD code — Add overseas reprocessing site
baselAndOecdCodes.heading: [Welsh] What are the Basel Convention and OECD codes for the waste?
baselAndOecdCodes.hint: [Welsh] Basel codes start with one letter followed by 4 digits, for example A1181. OECD codes start with two letters followed by 3 digits, for example GC010.

validation.code1Required: [Welsh] Enter at least one Basel Convention or OECD code
validation.codeInvalid: [Welsh] Enter a valid Basel Convention or OECD code

repatriatedLoads.hint: [Welsh] Do not include personal or financial information.
repatriatedLoads.maxWords: [Welsh] You can enter up to 500 words

validation.required: [Welsh] Describe the arrangements for loads that are rejected or returned to the UK
validation.tooManyWords: [Welsh] Description must be 500 words or fewer

conditionsOfExport.title: [Welsh] Conditions of export — Add overseas reprocessing site
conditionsOfExport.heading: [Welsh] Does the site meet the conditions of export?
conditionsOfExport.intro: [Welsh] The overseas reprocessing site must meet all of the following conditions:
conditionsOfExport.condition1: [Welsh] The application is for export of Aluminium or Steel packaging waste.
conditionsOfExport.condition2: [Welsh] The packaging waste is separated at source, or processed, to ensure it is exported for reprocessing within a shipment of similar material – for example, if the shipment contains steel drink cans and steel scrap and is not a general mix of different materials  (such as paper and plastic), or a mixture of different grades of the same material (for example, different plastic polymers).
conditionsOfExport.condition3: [Welsh] There is a well-established international technical specification for the exported packaging waste material that your consignments meet.
conditionsOfExport.condition4: [Welsh] The material needs only limited processing overseas before it is recovered, and the recycling process has losses that meet EU industry standards.
conditionsOfExport.condition5: [Welsh] Processing the waste material before recycling does not include hand-sorting that may cause significant harm to human health.
conditionsOfExport.condition6: [Welsh] The material goes through a recognised form of recycling, and is unlikely to cause significant harm to the environment.
conditionsOfExport.questionLabel: [Welsh] Does the site meet all of the conditions listed above?

validation.required: [Welsh] Select yes if the site meets the conditions of export
